data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`), but it's never added to the `Compile` item group, so the C# compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add a `<Compile>` item for the generated file inside the target:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is written to disk but the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add an `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside the target, after the file is generated. This tells MSBuild to include the generated file in compilation.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-85c042ad2c3844949f884f5774f8200b/TestProject.csproj", "old_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. The generated file needs to be added to the `Compile` item group so the C# compiler includes it.

**Fix:** Added `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside the target, after the file is written.
